scripts.release:build: pnpm --filter @workspace/tokens build && pnpm --filter @keys2design/whds-tailwind-preset build && pnpm --filter @keys2design/whds-ui build
scripts.release:verify: pnpm run release:build && pnpm --filter @keys2design/whds-ui typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter storybook typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/design-registry typecheck
scripts.release:pack: pnpm run release:verify && pnpm --filter @keys2design/whds-tailwind-preset pack && pnpm --filter @keys2design/whds-ui pack
scripts.publish:tailwind-preset: pnpm run release:verify && pnpm --filter @keys2design/whds-tailwind-preset publish --access restricted
scripts.publish:ui: pnpm run release:verify && pnpm --filter @keys2design/whds-ui publish --access restricted
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm run publish:tailwind-preset && pnpm run publish:ui
